title: The Clever Peasant Girl
lines: A poor peasant had a beautiful daughter known for her cleverness.
One day the king passed by and saw her.
He decided to marry her on one condition: if she could solve his riddles, she would become his wife.
The peasant girl accepted the challenge.
The king posed three riddles, and she answered them all correctly with wit and wisdom.
The king was amazed and delighted, and he married her.
As queen, she used her cleverness to rule wisely and justly.
One day the king tested her loyalty by pretending to banish her from the kingdom.
She packed a small box with her most precious possession, her portrait, and set out.
The king was moved by her faithfulness and her wisdom.
He forgave her and declared that she would always be his true queen.
Together they ruled the kingdom with fairness and kindness.
